content.content:
./CLAUDE.md
./exe/[FRT] Part Master 설정 가이드.md
./exe/[REAR] Part Master 설정 가이드.md

./NX4C_ASS_수정요청.md

1→# NX4C DSC CHINA — Project Overview
     2→
     3→## Project Info
     4→- **Path**: `C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\DSC CHINA NX4\`
     5→- **Type**: VB.NET .NET Framework 4.8 WinForms (industrial assembly line control)
     6→- **DB**: REAR → SQL Server (`192.168.0.200\NX4C_SVR`, DB: `NX4C`, sa/sns123.,), FRT → Local Access MDB per station
     7→
     8→## Folder Structure
     9→```
    10→DSC CHINA NX4/
    11→├── NX4C FRT/NX4C FRT/         # FRT (Front Back) projects
    12→│   ├── JA01/                  # FRT JA01 station (FRT JA01.vbproj)
    13→│   ├── JA02/                  # FRT JA02 station (FRT JA02.vbproj) — bug fixes applied
    14→│   ├── JA03/                  # FRT JA03 station (FRT JA03.vbproj)
    15→│   ├── JA04/                  # FRT JA04 station (FRT JA04.vbproj)
    16→│   └── SERVER SEARCH/         # FRT history viewer (SERVEr Search.vbproj)
    17→├── NX4C REAR/                 # REAR (Rear Back) projects
    18→│   ├── RH_JA01/               # REAR RH JA01 (RH_JA01(201).vbproj)
    19→│   ├── RH_JA02/               # REAR RH JA02 (RH_JA02(202).vbproj) — belt scan added
    20→│   ├── RH_JA03/               # REAR RH JA03 (RH_JA03(203).vbproj) — damper skip added
    21→│   ├── LH_JA01/               # REAR LH JA01 (LH_JA01(211).vbproj)
    22→│   ├── LH_JA02/               # REAR LH JA02 (LH_JA02(212).vbproj) — belt scan added
    23→│   ├── SERVER SEARCH/         # REAR history viewer (SERVEr Search.vbproj)
    24→│   ├── PartEditor/            # Part Master editor standalone app (new)
    25→│   ├── END TEST/              # End-of-line test (NI dependency — cannot build on this PC)
    26→│   ├── KU VIP 2ND BACK/       # KU VIP variant (Mitsubishi PLC dependency)
    27→│   └── ALTER_TablePart.sql    # DB schema update script
    28→└── exe/                       # Distribution folder (all builds + guides)
    29→```
    30→
    31→## Assembly Naming Convention
    32→- Pattern: `NX4C_[FRT|REAR]_[STATION](YYYYMMDD).exe`
    33→- Examples: `NX4C_FRT_JA02(20260313).exe`, `NX4C_REAR_RH_JA02(20260313).exe`
    34→- Set via `<AssemblyName>` in .vbproj
    35→
    36→## Key Technical Details
    37→- REAR uses ADODB Recordset (SQLOLEDB provider) for SQL Server
    38→- FRT uses OleDb (Microsoft.Jet.OLEDB.4.0) for Access MDB
    39→- Step-based state machine: `wStep` (Double type, supports 3.1, 4.1 etc.)
    40→- Serial barcode scanner: `Serial_Scanner_DataReceived` handler
    41→- Digital I/O: `DO_ON/DO_OFF/DO_WRITE` pattern for PLC signaling
    42→
    43→## DB Schema (REAR SQL Server)
    44→### TablePart (Part Master)
    45→- PartNo, PartName, OptionPosition (LH/RH), OptionRemote (Boolean)
    46→- **OptionBeltCode** (NVARCHAR 20) — belt barcode identification code (added 2026-03-13)
    47→- **OptionDamper** (NVARCHAR 10) — USE/SKIP (added 2026-03-13)
    48→- Seq, Model, UseYN
    49→
    50→### TableMainRH / TableMainLH (Production History)
    51→- LineSerial, JA01~JA03 DATE/START_TIME/END_TIME/DECISION
    52→- JA02_TQ1, JA02_TQ2 (RH only)
    53→- **JA02_BELT_BARCODE** (NVARCHAR 50) — scanned barcode value (added 2026-03-13)
    54→- **JA02_BELT_DECISION** (NVARCHAR 10) — OK/NA (added 2026-03-13)
    55→
    56→## Build Notes
    57→- MSBuild required (.NET Framework 4.8 targeting)
    58→- Cannot build on this PC: END TEST (NationalInstruments UI), KU VIP (Mitsubishi PLC COM)
    59→- FlexCell Grid used in FrmPart.vb (legacy, not modified)
    60→
    61→---
    62→
    63→## Work Log
    64→
    65→### 2026-03-13 (09:00 ~ 14:12)
    66→
    67→**Modification requests (5 items):**
    68→
    69→| # | Request | Solution | Status |
    70→|---|---------|----------|--------|
    71→| 1 | FRT JA02: OE barcode car type shows wrong value | Bug fix — `OPTJON_CARTYPE` typo → `OPTION_CARTYPE` | Done |
    72→| 2 | FRT JA02: OE SAB/CSAB assembly should be skipped | Guide doc — set SAB=NONE in Part Master | Done |
    73→| 3 | FRT JA02: Lumbar support not working for 4 parts | Guide doc — set L/SUPT in Part Master | Done |
    74→| 4 | REAR JA02: Belt barcode identification needed | Code — belt scan verification in RH/LH JA02 | Done |
    75→| 5 | REAR JA03: Damper assembly skip for certain parts | Code — OptionDamper=SKIP logic in RH_JA03 | Done |
    76→
    77→**Additional bugs found & fixed (FRT JA02):**
    78→- `OPTION_cSAB` was reading from wrong field (`OPTION_SAB`)
    79→- `OPTION_VENT` was commented out (not loading)
    80→
    81→**New features implemented:**
    82→- REAR RH/LH JA02: Belt barcode scan UI (lblBeltHeader, srcBeltValue, srcBeltDec) + verification logic at wStep 3/3.1
    83→- REAR RH/LH JA02: Belt scan data saved to DB (JA02_BELT_BARCODE, JA02_BELT_DECISION)
    84→- REAR RH JA03: Damper skip logic at wStep 3 (OptionDamper=SKIP → skip torque check)
    85→- REAR PartEditor: Standalone Part Master editor with DB Schema Update button
    86→- SQL schema extension: OptionBeltCode, OptionDamper on TablePart; BELT columns on TableMainRH/LH
    87→
    88→**Deliverables (exe folder):**
    89→- 12 exe files (FRT 5 + REAR 7) — all .NET Framework 4.8
    90→- 3 guide documents (전체/FRT/REAR)
    91→- 1 SQL script (ALTER_TablePart.sql)
    92→- 1 .NET Framework installer (ndp48)
    93→

1→-- NX4C REAR TablePart schema extension
     2→-- Add OptionBeltCode for belt barcode verification (JA02)
     3→-- Add OptionDamper for damper assembly skip (JA03)
     4→-- Run on SQL Server: 192.168.0.200\NX4C_SVR, Database: NX4C
     5→
     6→USE NX4C;
     7→GO
     8→
     9→-- Belt identification code per part (e.g., 702636, 705354)
    10→IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sys.columns WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID('TablePart') AND name = 'OptionBeltCode')
    11→BEGIN
    12→    ALTER TABLE TablePart ADD OptionBeltCode NVARCHAR(20) DEFAULT '';
    13→END
    14→GO
    15→
    16→-- Damper assembly option: 'USE' (default) or 'SKIP'
    17→IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sys.columns WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID('TablePart') AND name = 'OptionDamper')
    18→BEGIN
    19→    ALTER TABLE TablePart ADD OptionDamper NVARCHAR(10) DEFAULT 'USE';
    20→END
    21→GO
    22→
    23→-- Set belt codes for known parts
    24→UPDATE TablePart SET OptionBeltCode = '702636' WHERE PartNo IN ('88410-N8610NNB', '88410-N8620NNB');
    25→UPDATE TablePart SET OptionBeltCode = '705354' WHERE PartNo IN ('88310-N8610NNB', '88310-N8620NNB');
    26→GO
    27→
    28→PRINT 'TablePart schema update complete.';
    29→GO
    30→
    31→-- Belt barcode scan data columns for TableMainRH (JA02)
    32→IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sys.columns WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID('TableMainRH') AND name = 'JA02_BELT_BARCODE')
    33→BEGIN
    34→    ALTER TABLE TableMainRH ADD JA02_BELT_BARCODE NVARCHAR(50) DEFAULT '';
    35→END
    36→GO
    37→
    38→IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sys.columns WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID('TableMainRH') AND name = 'JA02_BELT_DECISION')
    39→BEGIN
    40→    ALTER TABLE TableMainRH ADD JA02_BELT_DECISION NVARCHAR(10) DEFAULT '';
    41→END
    42→GO
    43→
    44→-- Belt barcode scan data columns for TableMainLH (JA02)
    45→IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sys.columns WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID('TableMainLH') AND name = 'JA02_BELT_BARCODE')
    46→BEGIN
    47→    ALTER TABLE TableMainLH ADD JA02_BELT_BARCODE NVARCHAR(50) DEFAULT '';
    48→END
    49→GO
    50→
    51→IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sys.columns WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID('TableMainLH') AND name = 'JA02_BELT_DECISION')
    52→BEGIN
    53→    ALTER TABLE TableMainLH ADD JA02_BELT_DECISION NVARCHAR(10) DEFAULT '';
    54→END
    55→GO
    56→
    57→PRINT 'TableMainRH/LH schema update complete.';
    58→GO

1→Imports System

     7→Namespace PartEditor

     9→    ''' <summary>
    10→    ''' Main form for editing TablePart in NX4C SQL Server database.

    12→    ''' </summary>
    13→    Public Class FrmMain
    14→
    15→        ' ---------------------------------------------------------------
    16→        ' Constants

    19→            "Provider=SQLOLEDB;Data Source=192.168.0.200\NX4C_SVR;" &
    20→            "Initial Catalog=NX4C;User ID=sa;Password=sns123.,"
    21→
    22→        Private Const COL_PART_NO As String = "PartNo"
    23→        Private Const COL_PART_NAME As String = "PartName"
    24→        Private Const COL_OPT_POSITION As String = "OptionPosition"

    31→
    32→        ' ---------------------------------------------------------------

    38→        ' ---------------------------------------------------------------

    41→        Public Sub New()

    45→
    46→        ''' <summary>
    47→        ''' Configure DataGridView columns. Must be called after InitializeComponent.
    48→        ''' Uses explicit column definitions so AutoGenerateColumns can be False,
    49→        ''' enabling ComboBoxColumn for OptionPosition, OptionDamper, UseYN.
    50→        ''' </summary>
    51→        Private Sub SetupDataGridView()
    52→            dgvPart.AutoGenerateColumns = False
    53→            dgvPart.Columns.Clear()
    54→
    55→            ' PartNo - text (primary key)

    63→            ' PartName - text

    81→            ' OptionRemote - checkbox (BIT column)

    89→            ' OptionBeltCode - text

   134→        ' ---------------------------------------------------------------
   135→        ' Data Load
   136→        ' ---------------------------------------------------------------
   137→        ''' <summary>
   138→        ''' Load all rows from TablePart ordered by Seq, then PartNo.
   139→        ''' </summary>
   140→        Private Sub LoadData()
   141→            Try
   142→                Cursor = Cursors.WaitCursor
   143→                lblStatus.Text = "Loading..."
   144→                Application.DoEvents()
   145→
   146→                Using conn As New OleDbConnection(CONN_STRING)
   147→                    conn.Open()
   148→                    Dim sql As String =
   149→                        "SELECT PartNo, PartName, OptionPosition, OptionRemote, " &
   150→                        "OptionBeltCode, OptionDamper, Seq, Model, UseYN " &
   151→                        "FROM TablePart ORDER BY Seq, PartNo"
   152→
   153→                    Dim adapter As New OleDbDataAdapter(sql, conn)
   154→                    _fullTable = New DataTable()
   155→                    adapter.Fill(_fullTable)
   156→                End Using
   157→
   158→                ' Convert DBNull to empty string to prevent ComboBox DataError
   159→                NormalizeStringColumns()
   160→                ApplyFilter(txtSearch.Text.Trim())
   161→
   162→            Catch ex As Exception
   163→                lblStatus.Text = "Load failed: " & ex.Message
   164→                MessageBox.Show("Load error:" & Environment.NewLine & ex.Message,
   165→                                "Error", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error)
   166→            Finally
   167→                Cursor = Cursors.Default
   168→            End Try
   169→        End Sub
   170→
   171→        ''' <summary>
   172→        ''' Replace DBNull with empty string for NVARCHAR columns used in ComboBoxColumn.
   173→        ''' Prevents "value is not valid" DataError on binding.
   174→        ''' Uses Convert.IsDBNull because Microsoft.VisualBasic.Information.IsDBNull
   175→        ''' is not in scope when Namespace wraps the class.
   176→        ''' </summary>
   177→        Private Sub NormalizeStringColumns()
   178→            If _fullTable Is Nothing Then Return
   179→            Dim stringCols() As String = {
   180→                COL_PART_NO, COL_PART_NAME, COL_OPT_POSITION,
   181→                COL_OPT_BELT, COL_OPT_DAMPER, COL_MODEL, COL_USE_YN
   182→            }
   183→            For Each row As DataRow In _fullTable.Rows
   184→                For Each colName As String In stringCols
   185→                    If _fullTable.Columns.Contains(colName) Then
   186→                        If Convert.IsDBNull(row(colName)) Then
   187→                            row(colName) = ""
   188→                        End If
   189→                    End If
   190→                Next
   191→            Next
   192→        End Sub
   193→
   194→        ' ---------------------------------------------------------------
   195→        ' Filter
   196→        ' ---------------------------------------------------------------
   197→        ''' <summary>
   198→        ''' Filter master table by PartNo substring and rebind grid.
   199→        ''' Empty keyword shows all rows from _fullTable directly.
   200→        ''' </summary>
   201→        Private Sub ApplyFilter(keyword As String)
   202→            If _fullTable Is Nothing Then Return
   203→
   204→            If String.IsNullOrEmpty(keyword) Then
   205→                dgvPart.DataSource = Nothing
   206→                dgvPart.DataSource = _fullTable
   207→                lblStatus.Text = "Total " & _fullTable.Rows.Count & " rows."
   208→            Else
   209→                _filteredTable = _fullTable.Clone()
   210→                For Each row As DataRow In _fullTable.Rows
   211→                    If row(COL_PART_NO).ToString().IndexOf(keyword,
   212→                            StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) >= 0 Then
   213→                        _filteredTable.ImportRow(row)
   214→                    End If
   215→                Next
   216→                dgvPart.DataSource = Nothing
   217→                dgvPart.DataSource = _filteredTable
   218→                lblStatus.Text = "Filtered " & _filteredTable.Rows.Count & " / " & _fullTable.Rows.Count & " rows."
   219→            End If
   220→        End Sub
   221→
   222→        ' ---------------------------------------------------------------
   223→        ' Save
   224→        ' ---------------------------------------------------------------
   225→        ''' <summary>
   226→        ''' Persist all pending changes to SQL Server.
   227→        ''' INSERT for Added, UPDATE for Modified, DELETE for Deleted rows.
   228→        ''' </summary>
   229→        Private Sub SaveData()
   230→            dgvPart.EndEdit()   ' Commit any active cell edit
   231→
   232→            ' Use whichever DataTable is currently displayed
   233→            Dim sourceTable As DataTable
   234→            If Not String.IsNullOrEmpty(txtSearch.Text.Trim()) AndAlso _filteredTable IsNot Nothing Then
   235→                sourceTable = _filteredTable
   236→            Else
   237→                sourceTable = _fullTable
   238→            End If
   239→
   240→            If sourceTable Is Nothing Then
   241→                lblStatus.Text = "No data loaded."
   242→                Return
   243→            End If
   244→
   245→            Try
   246→                Cursor = Cursors.WaitCursor
   247→                lblStatus.Text = "Saving..."
   248→                Application.DoEvents()
   249→
   250→                Dim savedCount As Integer = 0
   251→
   252→                Using conn As New OleDbConnection(CONN_STRING)
   253→                    conn.Open()
   254→                    For Each row As DataRow In sourceTable.Rows
   255→                        Select Case row.RowState
   256→                            Case DataRowState.Added
   257→                                ExecuteInsert(conn, row)
   258→                                savedCount += 1
   259→                            Case DataRowState.Modified
   260→                                ExecuteUpdate(conn, row)
   261→                                savedCount += 1
   262→                            Case DataRowState.Deleted
   263→                                ExecuteDelete(conn, row)
   264→                                savedCount += 1
   265→                            Case Else
   266→                                ' Unchanged — no action needed
   267→                        End Select
   268→                    Next
   269→                End Using
   270→
   271→                sourceTable.AcceptChanges()
   272→                lblStatus.Text = "Saved " & savedCount & " change(s) successfully."
   273→
   274→                If savedCount > 0 Then
   275→                    MessageBox.Show("Saved " & savedCount & " change(s).", "Save Complete",
   276→                                    MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Information)
   277→                Else
   278→                    MessageBox.Show("No changes to save.", "Save",
   279→                                    MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Information)
   280→                End If
   281→
   282→            Catch ex As Exception
   283→                lblStatus.Text = "Save failed: " & ex.Message
   284→                MessageBox.Show("Save error:" & Environment.NewLine & ex.Message,
   285→                                "Error", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error)
   286→            Finally
   287→                Cursor = Cursors.Default
   288→            End Try
   289→        End Sub
   290→
   291→        Private Sub ExecuteInsert(conn As OleDbConnection, row As DataRow)
   292→            Dim sql As String =
   293→                "INSERT INTO TablePart " &
   294→                "(PartNo, PartName, OptionPosition, OptionRemote, " &
   295→                "OptionBeltCode, OptionDamper, Seq, Model, UseYN) " &
   296→                "VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)"
   297→            Using cmd As New OleDbCommand(sql, conn)
   298→                AddAllParameters(cmd, row, useOriginal:=False)
   299→                cmd.ExecuteNonQuery()
   300→            End Using
   301→        End Sub
   302→
   303→        Private Sub ExecuteUpdate(conn As OleDbConnection, row As DataRow)
   304→            Dim sql As String =
   305→                "UPDATE TablePart SET " &
   306→                "PartName=?, OptionPosition=?, OptionRemote=?, " &
   307→                "OptionBeltCode=?, OptionDamper=?, Seq=?, Model=?, UseYN=? " &
   308→                "WHERE PartNo=?"
   309→            Using cmd As New OleDbCommand(sql, conn)
   310→                cmd.Parameters.Add("@PartName", OleDbType.VarWChar).Value = NullSafe(row(COL_PART_NAME))
   311→                cmd.Parameters.Add("@OptionPosition", OleDbType.VarWChar).Value = NullSafe(row(COL_OPT_POSITION))
   312→                cmd.Parameters.Add("@OptionRemote", OleDbType.Boolean).Value = BoolSafe(row(COL_OPT_REMOTE))
   313→                cmd.Parameters.Add("@OptionBeltCode", OleDbType.VarWChar).Value = NullSafe(row(COL_OPT_BELT))
   314→                cmd.Parameters.Add("@OptionDamper", OleDbType.VarWChar).Value = NullSafe(row(COL_OPT_DAMPER))
   315→                cmd.Parameters.Add("@Seq", OleDbType.Integer).Value = IntSafe(row(COL_SEQ))
   316→                cmd.Parameters.Add("@Model", OleDbType.VarWChar).Value = NullSafe(row(COL_MODEL))
   317→                cmd.Parameters.Add("@UseYN", OleDbType.VarWChar).Value = NullSafe(row(COL_USE_YN))
   318→                cmd.Parameters.Add("@PartNo", OleDbType.VarWChar).Value = NullSafe(row(COL_PART_NO))
   319→                cmd.ExecuteNonQuery()
   320→            End Using
   321→        End Sub
   322→
   323→        Private Sub ExecuteDelete(conn As OleDbConnection, row As DataRow)
   324→            Dim sql As String = "DELETE FROM TablePart WHERE PartNo=?"
   325→            Using cmd As New OleDbCommand(sql, conn)
   326→                cmd.Parameters.Add("@PartNo", OleDbType.VarWChar).Value =
   327→                    NullSafe(row(COL_PART_NO, DataRowVersion.Original))
   328→                cmd.ExecuteNonQuery()
   329→            End Using
   330→        End Sub
   331→
   332→        Private Sub AddAllParameters(cmd As OleDbCommand, row As DataRow, useOriginal As Boolean)
   333→            Dim ver As DataRowVersion = If(useOriginal, DataRowVersion.Original, DataRowVersion.Current)
   334→            cmd.Parameters.Add("@PartNo", OleDbType.VarWChar).Value = NullSafe(row(COL_PART_NO, ver))
   335→            cmd.Parameters.Add("@PartName", OleDbType.VarWChar).Value = NullSafe(row(COL_PART_NAME, ver))
   336→            cmd.Parameters.Add("@OptionPosition", OleDbType.VarWChar).Value = NullSafe(row(COL_OPT_POSITION, ver))
   337→            cmd.Parameters.Add("@OptionRemote", OleDbType.Boolean).Value = BoolSafe(row(COL_OPT_REMOTE, ver))
   338→            cmd.Parameters.Add("@OptionBeltCode", OleDbType.VarWChar).Value = NullSafe(row(COL_OPT_BELT, ver))
   339→            cmd.Parameters.Add("@OptionDamper", OleDbType.VarWChar).Value = NullSafe(row(COL_OPT_DAMPER, ver))
   340→            cmd.Parameters.Add("@Seq", OleDbType.Integer).Value = IntSafe(row(COL_SEQ, ver))
   341→            cmd.Parameters.Add("@Model", OleDbType.VarWChar).Value = NullSafe(row(COL_MODEL, ver))
   342→            cmd.Parameters.Add("@UseYN", OleDbType.VarWChar).Value = NullSafe(row(COL_USE_YN, ver))
   343→        End Sub
   344→
   345→        ' ---------------------------------------------------------------
   346→        ' Value helpers
   347→        ' ---------------------------------------------------------------
   348→        Private Function NullSafe(value As Object) As Object
   349→            If value Is Nothing OrElse Convert.IsDBNull(value) Then Return DBNull.Value
   350→            Return value
   351→        End Function
   352→
   353→        Private Function BoolSafe(value As Object) As Object
   354→            If value Is Nothing OrElse Convert.IsDBNull(value) Then Return False
   355→            If TypeOf value Is Boolean Then Return CType(value, Boolean)
   356→            Dim s As String = value.ToString().ToLower()
   357→            Return s = "1" OrElse s = "true"
   358→        End Function
   359→
   360→        Private Function IntSafe(value As Object) As Object
   361→            If value Is Nothing OrElse Convert.IsDBNull(value) Then Return 0
   362→            Dim result As Integer
   363→            If Integer.TryParse(value.ToString(), result) Then Return result
   364→            Return 0
   365→        End Function

   369→        ' ---------------------------------------------------------------
   370→        ''' <summary>
   371→        ''' Mark the selected row as Deleted in the DataTable.
   372→        ''' Actual DB delete is executed on Save.
   373→        ''' </summary>
   374→        Private Sub DeleteSelectedRow()
   375→            If dgvPart.SelectedRows.Count = 0 Then
   376→                lblStatus.Text = "Select a row to delete."
   377→                Return
   378→            End If
   379→
   380→            Dim partNo As String = ""
   381→            Dim cellVal As Object = dgvPart.SelectedRows(0).Cells("colPartNo").Value
   382→            If cellVal IsNot Nothing Then partNo = cellVal.ToString()
   383→
   384→            Dim dlgResult As DialogResult = MessageBox.Show(
   385→                "Delete row [" & partNo & "]? Changes will apply after Save.",
   386→                "Confirm Delete", MessageBoxButtons.YesNo, MessageBoxIcon.Warning)
   387→            If dlgResult <> DialogResult.Yes Then Return
   388→
   389→            Dim dt As DataTable = TryCast(dgvPart.DataSource, DataTable)
   390→            If dt IsNot Nothing Then
   391→                Dim rowIdx As Integer = dgvPart.SelectedRows(0).Index
   392→                If rowIdx >= 0 AndAlso rowIdx < dt.Rows.Count Then
   393→                    dt.Rows(rowIdx).Delete()
   394→                    lblStatus.Text = "Row [" & partNo & "] marked for deletion. Click Save to apply."
   395→                End If
   396→            End If
   397→        End Sub

   435→        Private Sub BtnDbUpdate_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btnDbUpdate.Click
   436→            Dim dlgResult As DialogResult = MessageBox.Show(
   437→                "DB 스키마를 업데이트합니다." & Environment.NewLine &
   438→                "(안전대 식별, 댐퍼 skip, 스캔 이력 저장용 컬럼 추가)" & Environment.NewLine & Environment.NewLine &
   439→                "이미 실행한 적이 있어도 다시 실행해도 안전합니다." & Environment.NewLine &
   440→                "진행하시겠습니까?",
   441→                "DB Schema Update", MessageBoxButtons.YesNo, MessageBoxIcon.Question)
   442→            If dlgResult <> DialogResult.Yes Then Return
   443→
   444→            RunSchemaUpdate()
   445→        End Sub
   446→
   447→        Private Sub RunSchemaUpdate()
   448→            Try
   449→                Cursor = Cursors.WaitCursor
   450→                lblStatus.Text = "DB Schema updating..."
   451→                Application.DoEvents()
   452→
   453→                ' Use ADO.NET SqlClient for DDL statements (OleDb cannot run IF NOT EXISTS blocks)
   454→                Dim connStr As String =
   455→                    "Data Source=192.168.0.200\NX4C_SVR;" &
   456→                    "Initial Catalog=NX4C;User ID=sa;Password=sns123.,"
   457→
   458→                Using conn As New System.Data.SqlClient.SqlConnection(connStr)
   459→                    conn.Open()
   460→
   461→                    ' Each ALTER must be executed separately
   462→                    Dim statements() As String = {
   463→                        "IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sys.columns WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID('TablePart') AND name = 'OptionBeltCode') " &
   464→                        "ALTER TABLE TablePart ADD OptionBeltCode NVARCHAR(20) DEFAULT ''",
   465→                        "IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sys.columns WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID('TablePart') AND name = 'OptionDamper') " &
   466→                        "ALTER TABLE TablePart ADD OptionDamper NVARCHAR(10) DEFAULT 'USE'",
   467→                        "UPDATE TablePart SET OptionBeltCode = '702636' WHERE PartNo IN ('88410-N8610NNB', '88410-N8620NNB') AND (OptionBeltCode IS NULL OR OptionBeltCode = '')",
   468→                        "UPDATE TablePart SET OptionBeltCode = '705354' WHERE PartNo IN ('88310-N8610NNB', '88310-N8620NNB') AND (OptionBeltCode IS NULL OR OptionBeltCode = '')",
   469→                        "IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sys.columns WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID('TableMainRH') AND name = 'JA02_BELT_BARCODE') " &
   470→                        "ALTER TABLE TableMainRH ADD JA02_BELT_BARCODE NVARCHAR(50) DEFAULT ''",
   471→                        "IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sys.columns WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID('TableMainRH') AND name = 'JA02_BELT_DECISION') " &
   472→                        "ALTER TABLE TableMainRH ADD JA02_BELT_DECISION NVARCHAR(10) DEFAULT ''",
   473→                        "IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sys.columns WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID('TableMainLH') AND name = 'JA02_BELT_BARCODE') " &
   474→                        "ALTER TABLE TableMainLH ADD JA02_BELT_BARCODE NVARCHAR(50) DEFAULT ''",
   475→                        "IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sys.columns WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID('TableMainLH') AND name = 'JA02_BELT_DECISION') " &
   476→                        "ALTER TABLE TableMainLH ADD JA02_BELT_DECISION NVARCHAR(10) DEFAULT ''"
   477→                    }
   478→
   479→                    For Each sql As String In statements
   480→                        Using cmd As New System.Data.SqlClient.SqlCommand(sql, conn)
   481→                            cmd.ExecuteNonQuery()
   482→                        End Using
   483→                    Next
   484→                End Using
   485→
   486→                lblStatus.Text = "DB Schema update complete."
   487→                MessageBox.Show(
   488→                    "DB 스키마 업데이트가 완료되었습니다." & Environment.NewLine & Environment.NewLine &
   489→                    "추가된 항목:" & Environment.NewLine &
   490→                    "  - TablePart: OptionBeltCode, OptionDamper" & Environment.NewLine &
   491→                    "  - TableMainRH: JA02_BELT_BARCODE, JA02_BELT_DECISION" & Environment.NewLine &
   492→                    "  - TableMainLH: JA02_BELT_BARCODE, JA02_BELT_DECISION",
   493→                    "완료", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Information)
   494→
   495→                ' Reload data to show new columns
   496→                LoadData()
   497→
   498→            Catch ex As Exception
   499→                lblStatus.Text = "DB Schema update failed: " & ex.Message
   500→                MessageBox.Show(
   501→                    "DB 스키마 업데이트 실패:" & Environment.NewLine & ex.Message & Environment.NewLine & Environment.NewLine &
   502→                    "서버 연결을 확인해 주세요." & Environment.NewLine &
   503→                    "문제가 지속되면 FTECH 담당자에게 문의해 주세요.",
   504→                    "오류", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error)
   505→            Finally
   506→                Cursor = Cursors.Default
   507→            End Try
   508→        End Sub
   509→

1→# [REAR] NX4C Rear Back — Part Master 설정 가이드
     2→
     3→---
     4→
     5→## 1. 프로그램 설치 방법
     6→
     7→### 1-1. .NET Framework 4.8 설치 (최초 1회)
     8→
     9→> 이미 설치되어 있다면 건너뛰세요.
    10→
    11→1. 이 폴더에 포함된 `ndp48-x86-x64-allos-enu.exe` 파일을 더블클릭합니다.
    12→2. 설치 화면이 나오면 **"동의"** → **"설치"** 를 클릭합니다.
    13→3. 설치 완료 후 **컴퓨터를 재시작**합니다.
    14→
    15→### 1-2. 프로그램 교체
    16→
    17→1. 현재 실행 중인 REAR 프로그램을 **종료**합니다.
    18→2. 기존 실행 파일(exe)이 있는 폴더로 이동합니다.
    19→3. 기존 exe 파일의 이름을 바꿔 백업합니다. (예: `RH_JA02.exe` → `RH_JA02_백업.exe`)
    20→4. 이 폴더의 해당 exe 파일을 **기존 exe가 있던 폴더에 복사**합니다.
    21→5. 복사한 파일의 이름을 기존 exe 이름과 **동일하게** 변경합니다.
    22→6. 프로그램을 실행하여 정상 작동하는지 확인합니다.
    23→
    24→> **주의**: `DB` 폴더(DB.mdb 파일)와 `Image` 폴더가 exe와 같은 위치에 있어야 합니다. exe만 교체하세요.
    25→
    26→### 1-3. Part Editor 설치 (신규 도구)
    27→
    28→`NX4C_REAR_PartEditor(20260313).exe` 파일은 **Part Master를 편집하는 독립 프로그램**입니다.
    29→
    30→1. `NX4C_REAR_PartEditor(20260313).exe` 파일을 **원하는 공정의 아무 PC에 복사**합니다.
    31→2. 더블클릭하면 바로 실행됩니다. (별도 설치 불필요)
    32→3. **어느 공정(RH_JA01, LH_JA02 등)의 PC든 상관없습니다** — REAR는 중앙 SQL Server를 사용하므로 어디서든 편집하면 모든 스테이션에 즉시 반영됩니다.
    33→
    34→> Part Editor는 설치가 필요 없습니다. exe 파일 하나만 복사하면 됩니다.
    35→> 바탕화면이나 원하는 위치에 두고 사용하세요.
    36→
    37→---
    38→
    39→## 2. SQL Server 스키마 업데이트 (★ 최초 1회 필수)
    40→
    41→> 이 작업을 하지 않으면 안전대 식별, 댐퍼 skip, 스캔 이력 저장이 작동하지 않습니다.
    42→
    43→### Part Editor의 "DB Schema Update" 버튼 사용
    44→
    45→1. `NX4C_REAR_PartEditor(20260313).exe` 를 더블클릭하여 실행합니다.
    46→2. 프로그램 상단에서 파란색 **"DB Schema Update"** 버튼을 클릭합니다.
    47→3. 확인 메시지가 나오면 **"예"** 를 클릭합니다.
    48→4. **"DB 스키마 업데이트가 완료되었습니다"** 메시지가 나오면 성공입니다.
    49→
    50→> 여러 번 눌러도 안전합니다. 이미 추가된 컬럼은 다시 추가하지 않습니다.
    51→
    52→---
    53→
    54→## 3. Part Master 편집 방법
    55→
    56→### 방법 1: Part Editor 사용 (추천)
    57→
    58→1. `NX4C_REAR_PartEditor(20260313).exe`를 더블클릭합니다.
    59→2. 프로그램이 열리면 TablePart의 전체 품번 목록이 표시됩니다.
    60→3. 편집할 품번을 찾습니다:
    61→   - 상단 **PartNo Search** 란에 품번 일부를 입력하면 필터링됩니다.
    62→   - 예: `N86` 을 입력하면 N86이 포함된 품번만 표시됩니다.
    63→4. 원하는 셀을 클릭하여 값을 변경합니다.
    64→5. 변경 후 **Save** 버튼을 클릭하면 저장됩니다.
    65→
    66→### 방법 2: 각 스테이션 프로그램의 Part 버튼 사용
    67→
    68→1. 스테이션 프로그램 메인 화면에서 **"Part"** 버튼을 클릭합니다.
    69→2. Part Master 편집 화면이 열립니다.
    70→3. 값을 변경하고 **저장** 버튼을 클릭합니다.
    71→
    72→> **REAR는 중앙 SQL Server를 사용**하므로, 어느 스테이션에서 편집하든
    73→> **모든 스테이션에 자동 반영**됩니다. 1곳에서만 편집하면 됩니다.
    74→
    75→---
    76→
    77→## 4. 옵션 컬럼 설명
    78→
    79→Part Master 표의 각 컬럼 의미:
    80→
    81→| 컬럼 이름 | 설명 | 선택 가능한 값 |
    82→|-----------|------|---------------|
    83→| **PartNo** | 품번 | 직접 입력 |
    84→| **PartName** | 품명 | 직접 입력 |
    85→| **Position** | LH/RH 방향 | `LH` 또는 `RH` (드롭다운 선택) |
    86→| **Remote** | 리모컨 옵션 | 체크박스 (체크=사용, 해제=미사용) |
    87→| **BeltCode** | 안전대 식별코드 (**신규**) | 숫자코드 직접 입력 (예: `702636`) 또는 빈칸 |
    88→| **Damper** | 댐퍼 조립 여부 (**신규**) | `USE`(조립함), `SKIP`(건너뜀) (드롭다운 선택) |
    89→| **Seq** | 표시 순서 | 숫자 입력 |
    90→| **Model** | 모델명 | 직접 입력 |
    91→| **UseYN** | 사용 여부 | `Y`(사용), `N`(미사용) (드롭다운 선택) |
    92→
    93→---
    94→
    95→## 5. 수정 요청별 설정 방법
    96→
    97→### 요청 1: R/B JA02 안전대 바코드 식별 추가
    98→
    99→**증상**: JA02 공정에서 안전대 종류를 구분하지 않고 조립됨
   100→
   101→**동작 방식 (업데이트 후)**:
   102→- Part Master에 **BeltCode**(안전대 식별코드)가 입력된 품번:
   103→  → JA02 공정에서 품번 스캔 후, **안전대 바코드를 추가로 스캔**해야 합니다.
   104→  → 스캔한 바코드에 식별코드가 포함되면 "Belt OK" → 다음 공정으로 진행
   105→  → 불일치하면 "Belt NG!" → NG 알림음 + 재스캔 대기
   106→- BeltCode가 **비어있는** 품번:
   107→  → 기존과 동일하게 안전대 스캔 없이 진행
   108→
   109→**설정 방법**:
   110→
   111→1. Part Editor를 실행합니다.
   112→2. 아래 품번을 찾아 **BeltCode** 컬럼에 식별코드를 입력합니다:
   113→
   114→| 품번 | BeltCode에 입력할 값 |
   115→|------|---------------------|
   116→| 88410-N8610NNB | `702636` |
   117→| 88410-N8620NNB | `702636` |
   118→| 88310-N8610NNB | `705354` |
   119→| 88310-N8620NNB | `705354` |
   120→
   121→3. **Save** 버튼을 클릭합니다.
   122→
   123→> SQL 스키마 업데이트(2장)를 먼저 실행했다면, 위 4개 품번은 이미 자동으로 설정되어 있습니다.
   124→
   125→### 요청 2: R/B JA03 댐퍼 2개 품번 조립 삭제
   126→
   127→**증상**: 특정 품번에서 댐퍼(防颤块/방진블록) 조립이 불필요
   128→
   129→**동작 방식 (업데이트 후)**:
   130→- Part Master에 **Damper** 값이 `SKIP`인 품번:
   131→  → JA03 공정에서 댐퍼 조립 단계를 **자동으로 건너뜁니다**
   132→  → 화면에 "Damper SKIP" 표시 후 다음 공정으로 진행
   133→- Damper 값이 `USE`인 품번 (기본값):
   134→  → 기존과 동일하게 댐퍼 조립 진행
   135→
   136→**설정 방법**:
   137→
   138→1. Part Editor를 실행합니다.
   139→2. 댐퍼 조립을 삭제할 품번을 찾습니다.
   140→3. **Damper** 컬럼: 드롭다운에서 `SKIP` 을 선택합니다.
   141→4. **Save** 버튼을 클릭합니다.
   142→
   143→> 나중에 다시 댐퍼 조립이 필요해지면 `USE`로 변경하면 됩니다.
   144→
   145→---
   146→
   147→## 6. 적용 순서 (전체 흐름)
   148→
   149→아래 순서대로 진행해 주세요:
   150→
   151→| 순서 | 작업 | 비고 |
   152→|------|------|------|
   153→| ① | .NET Framework 4.8 설치 | 최초 1회 |
   154→| ② | SQL Server 스키마 업데이트 | 최초 1회 (2장 참고) |
   155→| ③ | RH_JA02, LH_JA02 프로그램 교체 | 안전대 식별 적용 |
   156→| ④ | RH_JA03 프로그램 교체 | 댐퍼 skip 적용 |
   157→| ⑤ | Part Editor로 BeltCode/Damper 값 확인 | 이미 설정되어 있으면 건너뛰기 |
   158→| ⑥ | 테스트 실행 | 아래 체크리스트 참고 |
   159→
   160→---
   161→
   162→## 7. 테스트 체크리스트
   163→
   164→| # | 확인 항목 | 체크 |
   165→|---|----------|------|
   166→| 1 | SQL 스키마 업데이트 실행 완료 | ☐ |
   167→| 2 | Part Editor에서 품번 목록 정상 조회 | ☐ |
   168→| 3 | BeltCode 값 4개 품번 설정 확인 | ☐ |
   169→| 4 | RH_JA02: BeltCode 있는 품번 → 안전대 스캔 요구됨 | ☐ |
   170→| 5 | RH_JA02: BeltCode 없는 품번 → 기존대로 정상 진행 | ☐ |
   171→| 6 | LH_JA02: 위와 동일하게 작동 | ☐ |
   172→| 7 | RH_JA03: Damper=SKIP 품번 → 댐퍼 공정 건너뜀 | ☐ |
   173→| 8 | RH_JA03: Damper=USE 품번 → 댐퍼 공정 정상 진행 | ☐ |
   174→
   175→---
   176→
   177→## 8. 문의
   178→
   179→설정 변경 후에도 문제가 해결되지 않으면 FTECH 담당자에게 연락해 주세요.

### 2. 소스 파일 참조 매핑

#### B. **PartEditor (Part Master 편집 도구)**
- **파일**: `C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\DSC_CHINA_NX4\NX4C REAR\PartEditor\FrmMain.vb`
  - **상수 정의** (라인 22-30):

  - **DataGridView 컬럼 설정** (라인 51-131):

  - **INSERT 문** (라인 292-300):

file.content:
-- NX4C REAR TablePart schema extension
-- Add OptionBeltCode for belt barcode verification (JA02)
-- Add OptionDamper for damper assembly skip (JA03)
-- Run on SQL Server: 192.168.0.200\NX4C_SVR, Database: NX4C

USE NX4C;
GO

-- Belt identification code per part (e.g., 702636, 705354)
IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sys.columns WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID('TablePart') AND name = 'OptionBeltCode')
BEGIN
    ALTER TABLE TablePart ADD OptionBeltCode NVARCHAR(20) DEFAULT '';
END
GO

-- Damper assembly option: 'USE' (default) or 'SKIP'
IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sys.columns WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID('TablePart') AND name = 'OptionDamper')
BEGIN
    ALTER TABLE TablePart ADD OptionDamper NVARCHAR(10) DEFAULT 'USE';
END
GO

-- Set belt codes for known parts
UPDATE TablePart SET OptionBeltCode = '702636' WHERE PartNo IN ('88410-N8610NNB', '88410-N8620NNB');
UPDATE TablePart SET OptionBeltCode = '705354' WHERE PartNo IN ('88310-N8610NNB', '88310-N8620NNB');
GO

PRINT 'TablePart schema update complete.';
GO

-- Belt barcode scan data columns for TableMainRH (JA02)
IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sys.columns WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID('TableMainRH') AND name = 'JA02_BELT_BARCODE')
BEGIN
    ALTER TABLE TableMainRH ADD JA02_BELT_BARCODE NVARCHAR(50) DEFAULT '';
END
GO

IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sys.columns WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID('TableMainRH') AND name = 'JA02_BELT_DECISION')
BEGIN
    ALTER TABLE TableMainRH ADD JA02_BELT_DECISION NVARCHAR(10) DEFAULT '';
END
GO

-- Belt barcode scan data columns for TableMainLH (JA02)
IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sys.columns WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID('TableMainLH') AND name = 'JA02_BELT_BARCODE')
BEGIN
    ALTER TABLE TableMainLH ADD JA02_BELT_BARCODE NVARCHAR(50) DEFAULT '';
END
GO

IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sys.columns WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID('TableMainLH') AND name = 'JA02_BELT_DECISION')
BEGIN
    ALTER TABLE TableMainLH ADD JA02_BELT_DECISION NVARCHAR(10) DEFAULT '';
END
GO

PRINT 'TableMainRH/LH schema update complete.';
GO

소스에서는 `UseYN`인데 에러 메시지는 `UserYN`으로 보입니다 — 스크린샷에서 글씨가 작아 `UseYN`이 맞을 가능성이 높습니다.

**문제 원인**: `ALTER_TablePart.sql`에 `OptionBeltCode`와 `OptionDamper`만 있고, `Seq`, `Model`, `UseYN` 3개 컬럼 ALTER가 빠져있습니다.

SQL 스크립트를 업데이트하겠습니다.

-- Display order
IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sys.columns WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID('TablePart') AND name = 'Seq')
BEGIN
    ALTER TABLE TablePart ADD Seq INT NULL;
END
GO

-- Model name
IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sys.columns WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID('TablePart') AND name = 'Model')
BEGIN
    ALTER TABLE TablePart ADD Model NVARCHAR(50) DEFAULT '';
END
GO

-- Use Y/N flag
IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sys.columns WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID('TablePart') AND name = 'UseYN')
BEGIN
    ALTER TABLE TablePart ADD UseYN NVARCHAR(5) DEFAULT '';
END
GO

toolUseResult.originalFile:
-- NX4C REAR TablePart schema extension
-- Add OptionBeltCode for belt barcode verification (JA02)
-- Add OptionDamper for damper assembly skip (JA03)
-- Run on SQL Server: 192.168.0.200\NX4C_SVR, Database: NX4C

USE NX4C;
GO

-- Belt identification code per part (e.g., 702636, 705354)
IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sys.columns WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID('TablePart') AND name = 'OptionBeltCode')
BEGIN
    ALTER TABLE TablePart ADD OptionBeltCode NVARCHAR(20) DEFAULT '';
END
GO

-- Damper assembly option: 'USE' (default) or 'SKIP'
IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sys.columns WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID('TablePart') AND name = 'OptionDamper')
BEGIN
    ALTER TABLE TablePart ADD OptionDamper NVARCHAR(10) DEFAULT 'USE';
END
GO

-- Set belt codes for known parts
UPDATE TablePart SET OptionBeltCode = '702636' WHERE PartNo IN ('88410-N8610NNB', '88410-N8620NNB');
UPDATE TablePart SET OptionBeltCode = '705354' WHERE PartNo IN ('88310-N8610NNB', '88310-N8620NNB');
GO

PRINT 'TablePart schema update complete.';
GO

-- Belt barcode scan data columns for TableMainRH (JA02)
IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sys.columns WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID('TableMainRH') AND name = 'JA02_BELT_BARCODE')
BEGIN
    ALTER TABLE TableMainRH ADD JA02_BELT_BARCODE NVARCHAR(50) DEFAULT '';
END
GO

IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sys.columns WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID('TableMainRH') AND name = 'JA02_BELT_DECISION')
BEGIN
    ALTER TABLE TableMainRH ADD JA02_BELT_DECISION NVARCHAR(10) DEFAULT '';
END
GO

-- Belt barcode scan data columns for TableMainLH (JA02)
IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sys.columns WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID('TableMainLH') AND name = 'JA02_BELT_BARCODE')
BEGIN
    ALTER TABLE TableMainLH ADD JA02_BELT_BARCODE NVARCHAR(50) DEFAULT '';
END
GO

IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sys.columns WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID('TableMainLH') AND name = 'JA02_BELT_DECISION')
BEGIN
    ALTER TABLE TableMainLH ADD JA02_BELT_DECISION NVARCHAR(10) DEFAULT '';
END
GO

PRINT 'TableMainRH/LH schema update complete.';
GO

**현장 안내 내용 정리:**

현장 DB(`192.168.0.200\NX4C_SVR`)에서 `ALTER_TablePart.sql`을 실행하면 됩니다. `TablePart` 테이블에 5개 컬럼이 추가됩니다:

| 컬럼 | 타입 | 용도 |
|------|------|------|
| `OptionBeltCode` | NVARCHAR(20) | 안전대 바코드 식별코드 |
| `OptionDamper` | NVARCHAR(10) | 댐퍼 USE/SKIP |
| `Seq` | INT | 표시 순서 |
| `Model` | NVARCHAR(50) | 모델명 |
| `UseYN` | NVARCHAR(5) | 사용 여부 |

SQL 스크립트는 `IF NOT EXISTS` 처리되어 있어 중복 실행해도 안전합니다. `exe` 폴더의 스크립트도 업데이트했습니다.

현장 담당자에게 전달하실 내용이 필요하면 말씀해주세요.

    85→            colRemote.DataPropertyName = COL_OPT_REMOTE

   118→            colModel.HeaderText = "Model"
   119→            colModel.DataPropertyName = COL_MODEL
   120→            colModel.Width = 130
   121→            dgvPart.Columns.Add(colModel)

   124→            Dim colUseYN As New DataGridViewComboBoxColumn()
   125→            colUseYN.Name = "colUseYN"
   126→            colUseYN.HeaderText = "UseYN"
   127→            colUseYN.DataPropertyName = COL_USE_YN
   128→            colUseYN.Items.AddRange("", "Y", "N")

   130→            colUseYN.FlatStyle = FlatStyle.Flat
   131→            dgvPart.Columns.Add(colUseYN)
   132→        End Sub
   133→
   134→        ' ---------------------------------------------------------------
   135→        ' Data Load
   136→        ' ---------------------------------------------------------------
   137→        ''' <summary>
   138→        ''' Load all rows from TablePart ordered by Seq, then PartNo.
   139→        ''' </summary>
   140→        Private Sub LoadData()
   141→            Try
   142→                Cursor = Cursors.WaitCursor
   143→                lblStatus.Text = "Loading..."
   144→                Application.DoEvents()
   145→
   146→                Using conn As New OleDbConnection(CONN_STRING)
   147→                    conn.Open()
   148→                    Dim sql As String =
   149→                        "SELECT PartNo, PartName, OptionPosition, OptionRemote, " &
   150→                        "OptionBeltCode, OptionDamper, Seq, Model, UseYN " &
   151→                        "FROM TablePart ORDER BY Seq, PartNo"
   152→
   153→                    Dim adapter As New OleDbDataAdapter(sql, conn)
   154→                    _fullTable = New DataTable()
   155→                    adapter.Fill(_fullTable)
   156→                End Using
   157→
   158→                ' Convert DBNull to empty string to prevent ComboBox DataError
   159→                NormalizeStringColumns()
   160→                ApplyFilter(txtSearch.Text.Trim())
   161→
   162→            Catch ex As Exception
   163→                lblStatus.Text = "Load failed: " & ex.Message
   164→                MessageBox.Show("Load error:" & Environment.NewLine & ex.Message,
   165→                                "Error", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error)
   166→            Finally
   167→                Cursor = Cursors.Default
   168→            End Try
   169→        End Sub
   170→
   171→        ''' <summary>
   172→        ''' Replace DBNull with empty string for NVARCHAR columns used in ComboBoxColumn.
   173→        ''' Prevents "value is not valid" DataError on binding.
   174→        ''' Uses Convert.IsDBNull because Microsoft.VisualBasic.Information.IsDBNull
   175→        ''' is not in scope when Namespace wraps the class.
   176→        ''' </summary>
   177→        Private Sub NormalizeStringColumns()
   178→            If _fullTable Is Nothing Then Return
   179→            Dim stringCols() As String = {
   180→                COL_PART_NO, COL_PART_NAME, COL_OPT_POSITION,
   181→                COL_OPT_BELT, COL_OPT_DAMPER, COL_MODEL, COL_USE_YN
   182→            }
   183→            For Each row As DataRow In _fullTable.Rows
   184→                For Each colName As String In stringCols
   185→                    If _fullTable.Columns.Contains(colName) Then
   186→                        If Convert.IsDBNull(row(colName)) Then
   187→                            row(colName) = ""
   188→                        End If
   189→                    End If
   190→                Next
   191→            Next
   192→        End Sub
   193→
   194→        ' ---------------------------------------------------------------
   195→        ' Filter
   196→        ' ---------------------------------------------------------------
   197→        ''' <summary>
   198→        ''' Filter master table by PartNo substring and rebind grid.
   199→        ''' Empty keyword shows all rows from _fullTable directly.
   200→        ''' </summary>
   201→        Private Sub ApplyFilter(keyword As String)
   202→            If _fullTable Is Nothing Then Return
   203→
   204→            If String.IsNullOrEmpty(keyword) Then
   205→                dgvPart.DataSource = Nothing
   206→                dgvPart.DataSource = _fullTable
   207→                lblStatus.Text = "Total " & _fullTable.Rows.Count & " rows."
   208→            Else
   209→                _filteredTable = _fullTable.Clone()
   210→                For Each row As DataRow In _fullTable.Rows
   211→                    If row(COL_PART_NO).ToString().IndexOf(keyword,
   212→                            StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) >= 0 Then
   213→                        _filteredTable.ImportRow(row)
   214→                    End If
   215→                Next
   216→                dgvPart.DataSource = Nothing
   217→                dgvPart.DataSource = _filteredTable
   218→                lblStatus.Text = "Filtered " & _filteredTable.Rows.Count & " / " & _fullTable.Rows.Count & " rows."
   219→            End If
   220→        End Sub
   221→
   222→        ' ---------------------------------------------------------------
   223→        ' Save
   224→        ' ---------------------------------------------------------------
   225→        ''' <summary>
   226→        ''' Persist all pending changes to SQL Server.
   227→        ''' INSERT for Added, UPDATE for Modified, DELETE for Deleted rows.
   228→        ''' </summary>
   229→        Private Sub SaveData()
   230→            dgvPart.EndEdit()   ' Commit any active cell edit
   231→
   232→            ' Use whichever DataTable is currently displayed
   233→            Dim sourceTable As DataTable
   234→            If Not String.IsNullOrEmpty(txtSearch.Text.Trim()) AndAlso _filteredTable IsNot Nothing Then
   235→                sourceTable = _filteredTable
   236→            Else
   237→                sourceTable = _fullTable
   238→            End If
   239→
   240→            If sourceTable Is Nothing Then
   241→                lblStatus.Text = "No data loaded."
   242→                Return
   243→            End If
   244→
   245→            Try
   246→                Cursor = Cursors.WaitCursor
   247→                lblStatus.Text = "Saving..."
   248→                Application.DoEvents()
   249→
   250→                Dim savedCount As Integer = 0
   251→
   252→                Using conn As New OleDbConnection(CONN_STRING)
   253→                    conn.Open()
   254→                    For Each row As DataRow In sourceTable.Rows
   255→                        Select Case row.RowState
   256→                            Case DataRowState.Added
   257→                                ExecuteInsert(conn, row)
   258→                                savedCount += 1
   259→                            Case DataRowState.Modified
   260→                                ExecuteUpdate(conn, row)
   261→                                savedCount += 1
   262→                            Case DataRowState.Deleted
   263→                                ExecuteDelete(conn, row)
   264→                                savedCount += 1
   265→                            Case Else
   266→                                ' Unchanged — no action needed
   267→                        End Select
   268→                    Next
   269→                End Using
   270→
   271→                sourceTable.AcceptChanges()
   272→                lblStatus.Text = "Saved " & savedCount & " change(s) successfully."
   273→
   274→                If savedCount > 0 Then
   275→                    MessageBox.Show("Saved " & savedCount & " change(s).", "Save Complete",
   276→                                    MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Information)
   277→                Else
   278→                    MessageBox.Show("No changes to save.", "Save",
   279→                                    MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Information)
   280→                End If
   281→
   282→            Catch ex As Exception
   283→                lblStatus.Text = "Save failed: " & ex.Message
   284→                MessageBox.Show("Save error:" & Environment.NewLine & ex.Message,
   285→                                "Error", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error)
   286→            Finally
   287→                Cursor = Cursors.Default
   288→            End Try
   289→        End Sub
   290→
   291→        Private Sub ExecuteInsert(conn As OleDbConnection, row As DataRow)
   292→            Dim sql As String =
   293→                "INSERT INTO TablePart " &
   294→                "(PartNo, PartName, OptionPosition, OptionRemote, " &
   295→                "OptionBeltCode, OptionDamper, Seq, Model, UseYN) " &
   296→                "VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)"
   297→            Using cmd As New OleDbCommand(sql, conn)
   298→                AddAllParameters(cmd, row, useOriginal:=False)
   299→                cmd.ExecuteNonQuery()
   300→            End Using
   301→        End Sub
   302→
   303→        Private Sub ExecuteUpdate(conn As OleDbConnection, row As DataRow)
   304→            Dim sql As String =
   305→                "UPDATE TablePart SET " &
   306→                "PartName=?, OptionPosition=?, OptionRemote=?, " &
   307→                "OptionBeltCode=?, OptionDamper=?, Seq=?, Model=?, UseYN=? " &
   308→                "WHERE PartNo=?"
   309→            Using cmd As New OleDbCommand(sql, conn)
   310→                cmd.Parameters.Add("@PartName", OleDbType.VarWChar).Value = NullSafe(row(COL_PART_NAME))
   311→                cmd.Parameters.Add("@OptionPosition", OleDbType.VarWChar).Value = NullSafe(row(COL_OPT_POSITION))
   312→                cmd.Parameters.Add("@OptionRemote", OleDbType.Boolean).Value = BoolSafe(row(COL_OPT_REMOTE))
   313→                cmd.Parameters.Add("@OptionBeltCode", OleDbType.VarWChar).Value = NullSafe(row(COL_OPT_BELT))
   314→                cmd.Parameters.Add("@OptionDamper", OleDbType.VarWChar).Value = NullSafe(row(COL_OPT_DAMPER))
   315→                cmd.Parameters.Add("@Seq", OleDbType.Integer).Value = IntSafe(row(COL_SEQ))
   316→                cmd.Parameters.Add("@Model", OleDbType.VarWChar).Value = NullSafe(row(COL_MODEL))
   317→                cmd.Parameters.Add("@UseYN", OleDbType.VarWChar).Value = NullSafe(row(COL_USE_YN))
   318→                cmd.Parameters.Add("@PartNo", OleDbType.VarWChar).Value = NullSafe(row(COL_PART_NO))
   319→                cmd.ExecuteNonQuery()
   320→            End Using
   321→        End Sub
   322→
   323→        Private Sub ExecuteDelete(conn As OleDbConnection, row As DataRow)
   324→            Dim sql As String = "DELETE FROM TablePart WHERE PartNo=?"
   325→            Using cmd As New OleDbCommand(sql, conn)
   326→                cmd.Parameters.Add("@PartNo", OleDbType.VarWChar).Value =
   327→                    NullSafe(row(COL_PART_NO, DataRowVersion.Original))
   328→                cmd.ExecuteNonQuery()
   329→            End Using
   330→        End Sub
   331→
   332→        Private Sub AddAllParameters(cmd As OleDbCommand, row As DataRow, useOriginal As Boolean)
   333→            Dim ver As DataRowVersion = If(useOriginal, DataRowVersion.Original, DataRowVersion.Current)
   334→            cmd.Parameters.Add("@PartNo", OleDbType.VarWChar).Value = NullSafe(row(COL_PART_NO, ver))
   335→            cmd.Parameters.Add("@PartName", OleDbType.VarWChar).Value = NullSafe(row(COL_PART_NAME, ver))
   336→            cmd.Parameters.Add("@OptionPosition", OleDbType.VarWChar).Value = NullSafe(row(COL_OPT_POSITION, ver))
   337→            cmd.Parameters.Add("@OptionRemote", OleDbType.Boolean).Value = BoolSafe(row(COL_OPT_REMOTE, ver))
   338→            cmd.Parameters.Add("@OptionBeltCode", OleDbType.VarWChar).Value = NullSafe(row(COL_OPT_BELT, ver))
   339→            cmd.Parameters.Add("@OptionDamper", OleDbType.VarWChar).Value = NullSafe(row(COL_OPT_DAMPER, ver))
   340→            cmd.Parameters.Add("@Seq", OleDbType.Integer).Value = IntSafe(row(COL_SEQ, ver))
   341→            cmd.Parameters.Add("@Model", OleDbType.VarWChar).Value = NullSafe(row(COL_MODEL, ver))
   342→            cmd.Parameters.Add("@UseYN", OleDbType.VarWChar).Value = NullSafe(row(COL_USE_YN, ver))
   343→        End Sub

   345→        ' ---------------------------------------------------------------

   347→        ' ---------------------------------------------------------------

   353→        Private Function BoolSafe(value As Object) As Object

   356→            Dim s As String = value.ToString().ToLower()

   358→        End Function

   360→        Private Function IntSafe(value As Object) As Object

   364→            Return 0

   370→        ''' <summary>
   371→        ''' Mark the selected row as Deleted in the DataTable.
   372→        ''' Actual DB delete is executed on Save.

   376→                lblStatus.Text = "Select a row to delete."

   395→                End If

   397→        End Sub
   398→
   399→        ' ---------------------------------------------------------------
   400→        ' Event handlers

   402→        Private Sub FrmMain_Load(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles MyBase.Load

   437→                "DB 스키마를 업데이트합니다." & Environment.NewLine &
   438→                "(안전대 식별, 댐퍼 skip, 스캔 이력 저장용 컬럼 추가)" & Environment.NewLine & Environment.NewLine &
   439→                "이미 실행한 적이 있어도 다시 실행해도 안전합니다." & Environment.NewLine &
   440→                "진행하시겠습니까?",
   441→                "DB Schema Update", MessageBoxButtons.YesNo, MessageBoxIcon.Question)
   442→            If dlgResult <> DialogResult.Yes Then Return
   443→
   444→            RunSchemaUpdate()
   445→        End Sub
   446→
   447→        Private Sub RunSchemaUpdate()
   448→            Try
   449→                Cursor = Cursors.WaitCursor
   450→                lblStatus.Text = "DB Schema updating..."
   451→                Application.DoEvents()
   452→
   453→                ' Use ADO.NET SqlClient for DDL statements (OleDb cannot run IF NOT EXISTS blocks)
   454→                Dim connStr As String =
   455→                    "Data Source=192.168.0.200\NX4C_SVR;" &
   456→                    "Initial Catalog=NX4C;User ID=sa;Password=sns123.,"
   457→
   458→                Using conn As New System.Data.SqlClient.SqlConnection(connStr)
   459→                    conn.Open()
   460→
   461→                    ' Each ALTER must be executed separately
   462→                    Dim statements() As String = {
   463→                        "IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sys.columns WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID('TablePart') AND name = 'OptionBeltCode') " &
   464→                        "ALTER TABLE TablePart ADD OptionBeltCode NVARCHAR(20) DEFAULT ''",
   465→                        "IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sys.columns WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID('TablePart') AND name = 'OptionDamper') " &
   466→                        "ALTER TABLE TablePart ADD OptionDamper NVARCHAR(10) DEFAULT 'USE'",
   467→                        "UPDATE TablePart SET OptionBeltCode = '702636' WHERE PartNo IN ('88410-N8610NNB', '88410-N8620NNB') AND (OptionBeltCode IS NULL OR OptionBeltCode = '')",
   468→                        "UPDATE TablePart SET OptionBeltCode = '705354' WHERE PartNo IN ('88310-N8610NNB', '88310-N8620NNB') AND (OptionBeltCode IS NULL OR OptionBeltCode = '')",
   469→                        "IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sys.columns WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID('TableMainRH') AND name = 'JA02_BELT_BARCODE') " &
   470→                        "ALTER TABLE TableMainRH ADD JA02_BELT_BARCODE NVARCHAR(50) DEFAULT ''",
   471→                        "IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sys.columns WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID('TableMainRH') AND name = 'JA02_BELT_DECISION') " &
   472→                        "ALTER TABLE TableMainRH ADD JA02_BELT_DECISION NVARCHAR(10) DEFAULT ''",
   473→                        "IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sys.columns WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID('TableMainLH') AND name = 'JA02_BELT_BARCODE') " &
   474→                        "ALTER TABLE TableMainLH ADD JA02_BELT_BARCODE NVARCHAR(50) DEFAULT ''",
   475→                        "IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sys.columns WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID('TableMainLH') AND name = 'JA02_BELT_DECISION') " &
   476→                        "ALTER TABLE TableMainLH ADD JA02_BELT_DECISION NVARCHAR(10) DEFAULT ''"
   477→                    }
   478→
   479→                    For Each sql As String In statements
   480→                        Using cmd As New System.Data.SqlClient.SqlCommand(sql, conn)
   481→                            cmd.ExecuteNonQuery()
   482→                        End Using
   483→                    Next
   484→                End Using
   485→
   486→                lblStatus.Text = "DB Schema update complete."
   487→                MessageBox.Show(
   488→                    "DB 스키마 업데이트가 완료되었습니다." & Environment.NewLine & Environment.NewLine &
   489→                    "추가된 항목:" & Environment.NewLine &
   490→                    "  - TablePart: OptionBeltCode, OptionDamper" & Environment.NewLine &
   491→                    "  - TableMainRH: JA02_BELT_BARCODE, JA02_BELT_DECISION" & Environment.NewLine &
   492→                    "  - TableMainLH: JA02_BELT_BARCODE, JA02_BELT_DECISION",
   493→                    "완료", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Information)
   494→
   495→                ' Reload data to show new columns
   496→                LoadData()
   497→
   498→            Catch ex As Exception
   499→                lblStatus.Text = "DB Schema update failed: " & ex.Message
   500→                MessageBox.Show(
   501→                    "DB 스키마 업데이트 실패:" & Environment.NewLine & ex.Message & Environment.NewLine & Environment.NewLine &
   502→                    "서버 연결을 확인해 주세요." & Environment.NewLine &
   503→                    "문제가 지속되면 FTECH 담당자에게 문의해 주세요.",
   504→                    "오류", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error)
   505→            Finally
